name: onedoc-app
description: OneDoc commercial documentation web app for Pearson Packaging Systems — sidebar redesign

sessions.summary: Redesigned OneDoc from a horizontal tab layout to a professional sidebar-based dashboard. New index.html (3,524 lines) has: collapsible left sidebar (Blurple #343551) with grouped navigation (OVERVIEW/DATA/DOCUMENTS/EQUIPMENT/COMMERCIAL/HISTORY), white top bar with page title + quote folder input + Export dropdown, full-viewport grid layout with independently scrolling main area. All original functionality preserved: PDF export, Excel export, all 8 tab components, machine configs, RACI modal, Case Table Checker, 2-click Clear Page/All, CPP collapsible grids with anchor nav strip. SVG icons throughout. Pearson brand standards applied.
